sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75487" key="o)rxhstopala/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρχηστο-πᾰλάριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n75487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one skilled in</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀρχηστοπάλη,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Firm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
